triple_quicksort_safety.explanation: Quicksort safety: by well-founded induction on n. Pivot partitions the segment, then recursively sort both halves. The lengths are preserved.

triple_quicksort.explanation: Full quicksort correctness: the result is a sorted permutation of the input. Uses pivot's full spec with bounds.

triple_quicksort_full.solution:
Lemma triple_quicksort_full : forall p i n L,
  n = length L ->
  i >= 0 ->
  triple (val_quicksort p i n)
    (hseg L p i)
    (fun _ => \exists L', \[permut L L'] \* \[sorted L'] \* hseg L' p i).
Proof using.
  introv Hn Hi. applys triple_quicksort; auto.
Qed.
triple_quicksort_full.explanation: Full quicksort specification is identical to triple_quicksort.

hseg_app.solution:
Lemma hseg_app : forall L1 L2 p j,
    hseg (L1 ++ L2) p j
  = hseg L1 p j \* hseg L2 p (j + length L1).
Proof using.
  intros L1. induction L1 as [|v L1' IH]; intros.
  { rew_list. rewrite hseg_nil. xsimpl. math_rewrite (j + 0 = j). xsimpl. }
  { rew_list. do 2 rewrite hseg_cons. rewrite IH. xsimpl.
    math_rewrite (j + 1 + length L1' = j + (1 + length L1')). xsimpl. }
Qed.
hseg_app.explanation: Splitting lemma for array segments: hseg of concatenated lists equals star of two hseg's with appropriate indices.

hseg_focus_relative.solution:
Lemma hseg_focus_relative : forall (k:nat) L p j,
  0 <= k < length L ->
      hseg L p j
  ==> let v := LibList.nth k L in
         hcell v p (j+k)
      \* (\forall w, hcell w p (j+k) \-* hseg (LibList.update k w L) p j).
Proof using.
  introv Hk. lets (L1&x&L2&E&HK): LibList.list_middle_inv (A:=val) k L Hk.
  subst L. rewrite LibList.nth_middle.
  xchange hseg_app. xchange (hseg_cons x).
  math_rewrite (j + length L1 = j + k).
  xsimpl. intros w. rewrite LibList.update_middle.
  xchange <- (hseg_cons w). xchange <- hseg_app.
  math_rewrite (j + k = j + length L1). xsimpl.
Qed.
hseg_focus_relative.explanation: Focus on element k of an array segment: split into prefix, target cell, and suffix, then package the wand for update.

harray_focus_read.solution:
Lemma harray_focus_read : forall i L p,
  0 <= i < length L ->
      harray L p
  ==> let v := LibList.nth (abs i) L in
      hcell v p i \* (hcell v p i \-* harray L p).
Proof using.
  introv Hi. xchange (harray_focus i L p Hi).
  lets v: (LibList.nth (abs i) L). xsimpl. intros w.
  xchange (hforall_specialize v).
  rewrite LibList.update_nth_same. { xsimpl. } { typeclass. }
Qed.
harray_focus_read.explanation: Read-only focus: specialize the general focus lemma's universal quantifier with the original value, using update_nth_same.
